description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to type-check Ryven and ryvencore-qt using mypy on pushes to main and dev branches, on pull requests to any branch, and on workflow dispatch. Run the type-checking job on an ubuntu-latest environment with Python 3.10.x, installing ryvencore from the corresponding GitHub branch, setting up dependencies for ryvencore-qt and Ryven, and then running mypy for type checking.
